name: LGF Bookings
upgrade_notice: Require existing IN products (block + error if missing); pre-select TVA 10%; include product notes as line description.

sections.description: WordPress-native hotel CRM with calendar, bookings, guests, Invoice Ninja integration, and GitHub-based updating.
sections.changelog: • 1.9.2.01: Block invoice creation if IN products are missing (clear error with list of missing keys). Pre-select TVA 10% tax on invoices. Include product notes as line item description.
